scores.notes: The agent explains existing code rather than writing a new handler. Code is shown only in fragments/snippets (step-by-step excerpts) rather than as a complete, self-contained function. All APIs used are correct and idiomatic: ops.BlockedStatus/WaitingStatus, event.defer(), container.add_layer with combine=True, container.replan(), container.get_service().is_running(), relation.data[relation.app]. The layer structure with http check and on-check-failure restart is valid. Extra patterns like deferral, guard clauses, and _reconcile() reuse are correct and idiomatic but the task asked to 'write' the handler, which was not done as a standalone implementation.
